title: Missing Mac Installers for v4.5.1

comments.body: @kcak11 thank you for reporting the issue. The engineers with access to creating the mac installers are away on vacation so this will take a few days to resolve. We'll update the release artifacts asap. I'll update this issue once those are available.

> @kcak11 thank you for reporting the issue. The engineers with access to creating the mac installers are away on vacation so this will take a few days to resolve. We'll update the release artifacts asap. I'll update this issue once those are available.

Thanks @lsm5
